items.title: Stripe, PayPal Ventures bet on India’s Xflow to fix cross-border B2B payments
items.description: Stripe and PayPal Ventures have participated in Xflow's $16.6 million round that gives it a post-money valuation of $85 million.

items.title: Tesla’s battle with the California Department of Motor Vehicles isn’t over after all
items.description: Tesla has filed a lawsuit against the California DMV in the ongoing battle around Autopilot.

items.title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
items.description: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.
